hero.title: All-in-One PDF Tools
hero.subtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert, protect, and more — free online PDF tools with no registration required.

merge-pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge-pdf.desc: Combine multiple PDF files into one document.

split-pdf.title: Split PDF
split-pdf.desc: Split a PDF into multiple files by page range.

rotate-pdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotate-pdf.desc: Rotate pages in a PDF file by 90, 180 or 270 degrees.

delete-pages.title: Delete Pages
delete-pages.desc: Remove selected pages from a PDF file.

organize-pdf.title: Organize PDF
organize-pdf.desc: Reorder pages in a PDF with drag-and-drop.

extract-pages.title: Extract Pages
extract-pages.desc: Pull selected pages into a new PDF.

repair-pdf.title: Repair PDF
repair-pdf.desc: Recover and repair a damaged PDF file.

compress-pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.desc: Reduce PDF file size while preserving quality.

grayscale-pdf.title: Grayscale PDF
grayscale-pdf.desc: Convert a color PDF to black and white.

watermark-pdf.title: Add Watermark to PDF
watermark-pdf.desc: Stamp text, logo, or diagonal watermarks on every page of your PDF with full control over opacity, size, and placement.

jpg-to-pdf.title: JPG to PDF
jpg-to-pdf.desc: Convert JPG images to PDF format.

png-to-pdf.title: PNG to PDF
png-to-pdf.desc: Convert PNG images to PDF format.

bmp-to-pdf.title: BMP to PDF
bmp-to-pdf.desc: Convert BMP images to PDF format.

tiff-to-pdf.title: TIFF to PDF
tiff-to-pdf.desc: Convert TIFF images to PDF format.

pdf-to-jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.desc: Convert PDF pages to JPG images.

pdf-to-png.title: PDF to PNG
pdf-to-png.desc: Convert PDF pages to PNG images.

pdf-to-bmp.title: PDF to BMP
pdf-to-bmp.desc: Convert PDF pages to BMP images.

pdf-to-tiff.title: PDF to TIFF
pdf-to-tiff.desc: Convert PDF pages to TIFF images.

pdf-to-word.title: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.desc: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents.

pdf-to-ppt.title: PDF to PPT
pdf-to-ppt.desc: Convert PDF files to PowerPoint presentations.

excel-to-pdf.title: Excel to PDF
excel-to-pdf.desc: Convert Excel spreadsheets to PDF format.

txt-to-pdf.title: TXT to PDF
txt-to-pdf.desc: Convert plain text files to PDF.

pdf-to-txt.title: PDF to TXT
pdf-to-txt.desc: Extract text content from a PDF file.

pdf-to-zip.title: PDF to ZIP
pdf-to-zip.desc: Bundle PDF output files into a ZIP archive.

invoice-pdf.title: Invoice Generator
invoice-pdf.desc: Create professional invoices as PDF — add line items, taxes, discounts, logo, and custom color themes.

protect-pdf.title: Protect PDF
protect-pdf.desc: Add password protection to your PDF file.

unlock-pdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlock-pdf.desc: Remove password protection from a PDF file.

signature-pdf.title: Sign PDF
signature-pdf.desc: Add a handwritten, typed, or image signature to any page of your PDF with custom placement and signer details.

upload.dropzone: Drop your files here or click to browse
upload.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Fast, private, and free PDF tools — no registration required.
footer.filesDeleted: All files are automatically deleted after 1 hour.
